stratagem.name: COMMAND RE-ROLL
stratagem.lore: A great commander can bend even the vagaries of fate and fortune to their will, the better to ensure victory.
stratagem.when: In any phase, just after you have made a Hit roll, a Wound roll, a Damage roll, a saving throw, an Advance roll, a Charge roll, a Desperate Escape test, a Hazardous test, or just after you have rolled the dice to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon, for an attack, model or unit from your army.
stratagem.effect: You re-roll that roll, test or saving throw.

stratagem.name: COUNTER-OFFENSIVE
stratagem.lore: In close-quarters combat, the slightest hesitation can leave an opening for a swift foe to exploit.
stratagem.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has fought.
stratagem.target: One unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and that has not already been selected to fight this phase.

stratagem.name: EPIC CHALLENGE
stratagem.lore: The legends of the 41st Millennium are replete with deadly duels between mighty champions.
stratagem.when: Fight phase, when a Character unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more Attached units is selected to fight.
stratagem.target: One Character model in your unit.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, all melee attacks made by that model have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagem.name: INSANE BRAVERY
stratagem.lore: Indifferent to their own survival, these warriors hold their ground against seemingly impossible odds.
stratagem.when: Battle-shock step of your Command phase, just after you have failed a Battle-shock test taken for a unit from your army.
stratagem.target: The unit from your army that Battle-shock test was just taken for (even though your Battle-shocked units cannot normally be affected by your Stratagems).
stratagem.effect: Your unit is treated as having passed that test instead, and is not Battle-shocked as a result.

stratagem.name: GRENADE
stratagem.lore: Priming their hand-held projectiles, these warriors draw back and hurl death into the enemy's midst.
stratagem.target: One Grenades unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your Grenades unit. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagem.name: FIRE OVERWATCH
stratagem.lore: A hail of wildfire can drive back advancing foes.
stratagem.when: Your opponent's Movement or Charge phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or when an enemy unit starts or ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move.
stratagem.target: One unit from your army that is within 24" of that enemy unit and that would be eligible to shoot if it were your Shooting phase.
stratagem.effect: Your unit can shoot that enemy unit as if it were your Shooting phase.
stratagem.restrictions: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit, irrespective of the attacking weapon's Ballistic Skill or any modifiers. You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

stratagem.name: TANK SHOCK
stratagem.lore: Ramming the foe with a speeding vehicle may be an unsubtle tactic, but it is a murderously effective one.
stratagem.target: One Vehicle unit from your army.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, after your unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then select one melee weapon your unit is equipped with. Roll a number of D6 equal to that weapon's Strength characteristic. If that Strength characteristic is greater than that enemy unit's Toughness characteristic, roll two additional D6. For each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagem.name: RAPID INGRESS
stratagem.lore: Be it cunning strategy, potent technology or supernatural ritual, there are many means by which a commander may hasten their warriors' onset.
stratagem.when: End of your opponent's Movement phase.
stratagem.target: One unit from your army that is in Reserves.
stratagem.effect: Your unit can arrive on the battlefield as if it were the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagem.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem to enable a unit to arrive on the battlefield during a battle round it would not normally be able to do so in.

stratagem.name: GO TO GROUND
stratagem.lore: Seeking salvation from incoming fire, warriors hurl themselves into whatever cover they can find.
stratagem.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have a 6+ invulnerable save and have the Benefit of Cover.

stratagem.name: SMOKESCREEN
stratagem.lore: Even the most skilled marksmen struggle to hit targets veiled by billowing screens of smoke.
stratagem.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Smoke unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have the Benefit of Cover and the Stealth ability.

stratagem.name: HEROIC INTERVENTION
stratagem.lore: Voices raised in furious war cries, your warriors surge forth to meet the enemy's onslaught head-on.
stratagem.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagem.target: One unit from your army that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase.
stratagem.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase.
stratagem.restrictions: You can only select a Vehicle unit from your army if it is a Walker. Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.
